general.description: A premium 'Executive Lounge' feel. Deep blacks, rich navy, and metallic gold accents. The interface should feel quiet, expensive, and frictionless.

typography.font_family_secondary: Playfair Display, serif (for Greetings/Headings if available)

layout_strategy.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-4xl px-4 py-8 min-h-screen bg-[#0a0f1a]

ProfileHeader.structure: flex flex-col items-center md:flex-row md:items-start gap-6 mb-8
ProfileHeader.avatar: w-24 h-24 rounded-full border-2 border-[#c8a951] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(200,169,81,0.2)] object-cover
ProfileHeader.name: text-2xl font-light text-white mt-4 md:mt-0
ProfileHeader.badge: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#c8a951]/10 text-[#c8a951] text-xs font-medium tracking-wide mt-2 border border-[#c8a951]/20

TabSwitcher.container: flex space-x-1 bg-[#1a2332]/50 p-1 rounded-full mb-8 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 w-full md:w-auto
TabSwitcher.tab: flex-1 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-300 text-center

ReservationCard.container: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#1a2332]/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-[#c8a951]/30 transition-all duration-300
ReservationCard.layout: flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4
ReservationCard.date_block: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-white/5 rounded-xl border border-white/5
ReservationCard.route_line: hidden md:block w-px h-12 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#c8a951] to-transparent mx-4
ReservationCard.status_badge: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

PaymentCard.container: relative w-full aspect-[1.586] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1a2332] to-[#0a0f1a] rounded-2xl p-6 border border-white/10 shadow-xl overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#c8a951]/30 transition-all
PaymentCard.chip: w-12 h-10 bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#e0c065] to-[#c8a951] rounded-md mb-8 opacity-80
PaymentCard.number: text-xl md:text-2xl font-mono text-white/90 tracking-widest mb-6
PaymentCard.details: flex justify-between text-xs text-white/50 uppercase tracking-wider

instructions_to_main_agent: Retain all existing functionality (Stripe, API calls, Tabs logic). This is a VISUAL upgrade.
Use 'Manrope' or 'Inter' for fonts. If Manrope is not installed, use Inter but style it with wide tracking for uppercase labels.
Implement the 'Gold' accent carefully. Do not overuse it. It should feel like jewelry—small, precious touches.
Ensure the layout is responsive. On mobile, tabs should be easy to tap (min 44px height).
For the 'Reservations' list, use a staggered animation delay for each item entrance if possible.
Use the 'background_texture' image as a very subtle overlay on the main background (opacity 5-10%) if it adds depth, otherwise stick to the deep navy gradient.
Ensure all text remains in FRENCH as per the existing app.
CRITICAL: Do NOT break the existing 'my-account' route or component structure. Just replace the JSX/CSS within the component.
For the avatar, use the provided Unsplash URL as the default source if the user has no avatar.
Use Lucide-react icons with stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
